channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The Apple AirPods Pro 3 are a no-brainer for iPhone users — and this Amazon deal makes them even more enticing
item.description: The AirPods Pro 3, unfortunately, launched in Australia at a higher price than their predecessor, but this Amazon Big Smile Sale discount makes them a much more attractive proposition.

item.title: The Most Valuable Company in the World Welcomes You to Its Conference with ‘Veggie-Tales’-Adjacent Slop
item.description: And honestly, this observation is a little unfair to Veggie Tales.

item.title: Boox's new Go E Ink tablet includes a 10-inch display and runs Android 15
item.description: There are many E Ink tablets out there, but most of them are basically digital notebooks. They are great for reading and handwriting notes, but not so great for doing all of that regular tablet stuff like checking emails and doomscrolling. Boox, however, has released a number of E Ink tablets that can access the Google Play Store, opening up users to the wide world of traditional smartphone apps. The company's latest product is a refresh of the Go 10.3 tablet, called the Go 10.3 Lumi. This introduces plenty of new features and, as the name suggests, one is a front light. The tablet has been de...

item.title: What is the release date for The Pitt season 2 episode 11 on HBO Max?
item.description: As if tensions weren't high enough, ICE agents are about to bring a new patient to the door. But when is The Pitt season 2 episode 11 airing on HBO Max?

item.title: I love cheap kitchen appliances and I've found 12 must-haves in Amazon's Big Smile Sale for under AU$100
item.description: You don't need to spend a lot of money to kit out your kitchen, and there are plenty of deals on Amazon's Big Smile Sale to help you upgrade old gadgets, including air fryers, steamers, egg cookers and ice-cream makers, all under AU$100.
